creator: rami@alzaid.com
text:
When trying to make install /usr/ports/mail/pine4 and having LOCALBASE set to something other than /
usr/local the installation fails since /usr/local/include is hard-coded in the port for the header files.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Set LOCALBASE to something other than /usr/local and install the c-client port. After that install the pine4 port while LOCALBASE is still setup to something other than /usr/local.
